response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement with nearly two decades of hands-on experience spanning the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes). Current work on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling directly matches the AI agent development requirement, and a strong testing/TDD background (test libraries authored, TDD practice at RIDE) fits the quality expectations. Gaps are minor: no explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience, and Kotlin is absent, though deep polyglot experience suggests fast ramp-up.
strengths: Deep fullstack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, and AWS across multiple product companies
Current hands-on AI-agent and MCP tooling work, directly matching the AI agent development requirement
Strong testing culture: TDD practitioner, author of testing libraries, and testing workshop instructor
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Playwright experience listed
No Kotlin experience and limited recent Java exposure for the secondary backend stack
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche ecosystem less transferable to this role's stack
